reviews.review_description:
This game definitely has potential, but you had me at rogue like style. Probably my favorite kind of game these days.
     However; this game is completely on rails, which was a instant turn off for me. I feel if your game is going to be a rogue like game. Take away the rails. Definitely not a fan of games on rails. Drop Dead was great, but not something I play to often. 
      If you fixed it and made it full locomotion I may check it out again.

Nice graphics and playabilty.
Awesome atmosfere and immersion.
Nice parts with torch light effects when in darkness.

Need to change teleport for free movement and free roaming if want to be considered a Roguelike.
Need to cancel on rails as told previously.

With these changes it will be a really decent dungeoneer and I will give you 5 stars.
